description: Style Notepeter england presents a wide range of efficient, everyday travel gear combined with impressive style. This laptop backpack from Peter England, specifically designed for work and weekend trips, strikes the right balance between convenience and style. The various compartments are a smart, neat and compact way to carry your laptop with all your essentials and is on the  top of our wishlist!Product DetailsOne main zipped compartment with a laptop compartment that has a velcro closure and mesh organiser sleevesOne small zipped pocket on the mouth for enhanced spaceOne zipped pocket on the front with an organiser sleeve and an insert pocketCompartment for a music player and an outlet for headphonesOne padded haul loop for carrying at easeWide, adjustable padded handles and padded back for carrying at ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuriesMesh back for ventilationBranding on the frontMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustWarranty: 6 monthsSizeHeight: 46 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 15 cm
